title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING IN THE CITY OF TAGAYTAY, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, A GENERAL HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ISAAC TOLENTINO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
118 OG No. 28, 7885 (July 11, 2022)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11876, June 29, 2022 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING IN THE CITY OF TAGAYTAY, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, A GENERAL HOSPITAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ISAAC TOLENTINO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established in the City of Tagaytay, Province of Cavite, a general hospital to be known as the Isaac Tolentino Memorial Medical Center, which shall be under the direct control and supervision of the City Government of Tagaytay. The hospital shall be developed into a medical facility that leads and specialize in sports and rehabilitation medicine.

SEC. 2. The City Government of Tagaytay shall manage the Isaac Tolentino Memorial Medical Center, and prepare, in consultation with the Department of Health, a hospital development plan that is aligned with the Philippine Health Facility Development Plan. Any future increase in bed capacity, health care facilities, service capability, and human resources complement shall be based on the hospital development plan.

SEC. 3. The City Government of Tagaytay shall provide the necessary funds for the establishment of the Isaac Tolentino Memorial Medical Center. The Secretary of the DOH shall include in the Departmentâs subsidy program, support for the capital outlay requirements of the said hospital.

SEC. 4. If any provision or part of this Act is declared unconstitutional, the remaining parts or provisions not affected shall remain in full force and effect.

SEC. 5. All laws, executive orders, issuances, rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby modified accordingly.

SEC. 5. All laws, executive orders, issuances, rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby modified accordingly.

SEC. 6. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

LORD ALLAN JAY Q. VELASCO

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on August 3, 2021 and May 31, 2022, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARK LLANDRO L. MENDOZA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

JUN 29 2022

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
